content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.32%, Bank Nifty -1.56%, Realty -2.95%, Auto -2.01%; only Pharma and IT (defensive/INR-hedge) green. VIX +10.63% to 18.63 signals elevated risk. Defensive rotation into FMCG/Pharma is real and being expressed in our book already. Hold the line on existing winners, trail SLs on the ones running, and avoid stacking new exposure on a red-tape day.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF defensive; -1% drift on profit-booking, thesis intact. SL 121 is below 20-DMA support. CMP 123.81 leaves only ~2% to SL; chart-structure SL appropriate given low ATR. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% gain, breakout to 52w high on Q4 beat. SL already at entry+5 (effectively breakeven+). Trail-gap rule: CMP 838, SL 825 = 1.6% below CMP, satisfies 1% floor. Q4 beat sustains thesis; bump target to 860 to reflect 52w-high breakout magnitude. New SL equals stored SL (825) — no-op on SL but target raised."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.3% gain on Q4 beat + Cigniti merger. Stored SL 1357.20 is ABOVE today's intraday low 1359.60 — too tight, will get stopped on normal noise. Loosen SL would violate tighten-only rule, so I must NOT loosen. Re-checking: 1357.20 > 1340 means 1340 is LOWER = LOOSER. REJECT this MODIFY. Keep stored SL. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.1%, SL 1465 is 1.2% below CMP 1446.90 — wait, CMP 1446.90 < SL 1465 means SL would have triggered. Re-reading: CMP 1446.90, SL 1465 — for a long, SL must be BELOW entry/CMP. 1465 > 1446.90 means SL is ABOVE CMP which is impossible for an active long. Data inconsistency — treating stored SL as 1465 from entry 1490 (SL below entry, valid at entry). CMP has dropped below SL but no auto-trigger shown; thesis (Q4 PAT +37%, UVG 15.3%) still intact. Hold and let stored SL fire on next tick if it's going to."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1600.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% with Q4 PAT swing from loss to Rs164cr, EBITDA +148%, Zaynich EMA pathway. Pharma sector at 52w highs. SL 1600 = ~1.6% below CMP 1626, within trail-gap floor. Target bump to 1780 reflects sector momentum + biotech ramp. SL unchanged (no-op on SL field); target raised."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7%, chemicals sector leader +1.77%. FY26 PAT +47%, Odisha refrigerants capex upsized. SL 2760 is ~2% below CMP 2820. Position too early in move to trail; let the breakout extend."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, at ATH on 3.3x volume but UltraTech entry overhang flagged. Q4 revenue beat but adjusted PAT only +6.3%. SL 9020 = 0.3% below CMP 9052 — already within stopout proximity, will fire if it's meant to. Per Rule 17, do not preempt SL on intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.2%, CMP 351.80 below SL 354. SL is about to fire; per Rule 17 do not panic-close ahead of SL. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie/MS positive. Let stored SL trigger if it does — recovery option preserved."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, but Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 12,000 buyback floor, Rs 150 dividend, record volumes. SL 10440 is 1.2% below CMP 10565 — within risk budget. Auto sector -2.01% today is sector beta, not thesis-breaking. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.2%, SL 472 is 0.8% below CMP 476. Q4 PAT +15%, FY27 guidance raised. Per Rule 17 do not preempt SL. Let it run to SL or recover."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1228.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.6% gain, near 52w high, Q4 PAT +20.5% sixth straight YoY beat. Stored SL 1228 = 2.3% below CMP 1256.90, satisfies trail-gap floor. SL unchanged (already at entry+2). Target bump to 1320 from 1290 reflects pharma sector at 52w highs and CDMO momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.8%, intraday faded from high 1253 to 1226 (still up 6.5% on day). Q4 beat strong, fresh 52w high earlier. SL 1198 = 2.3% below CMP, within risk budget. Hold through the post-spike consolidation."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, thesis intact, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry+5 = locked-in gain. Target raised in decisions block."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1357.20 already tight; cannot loosen. Letting +9% winner run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post Q4 beat. SL placement decision belongs to entry-time, respect it."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1600.00,
      "reasoning": "SL unchanged; target raised to 1780 in decisions block."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Early in chemicals breakout, give room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near SL but let it fire if it must; Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP below SL; SL will fire on engine side."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12,000 caps downside, hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL close; Rule 17 — no preemptive exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1228.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry+2 already; target bumped."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat thesis intact; ride consolidation."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walking qualifying BULLISH candidates per Rule 18: SUNPHARMA (NEUTRAL -0.03, near 52w-high, Organon leverage overhang — REJECT, no edge over held WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS). TORNTPHARM (BULLISH +0.07, board meeting May 22 results — within 8 sessions, but Rule 11's 3-session window not breached today; HOWEVER stock is 0.4% from 52w high and already at R1 4438 — entry premium too rich, REJECT on R:R). LALPATHLAB (BEARISH -0.08, PAT -15% YoY despite price spike — REJECT, governance/earnings divergence). SUNPHARMA, TORNTPHARM kept on watch for pullback. HFCL pending order from prior session at 133.50 MIS LIMIT, 7551min stale — CANCEL.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 50%, cash 50% — below soft 80% target. VIX +10.6% with Nifty -1.3% is exactly the macro condition Rule 18 contemplates as a valid risk-off reject reason for new admits. Book is already 6 of 12 positions in defensive sectors (FMCG, Pharma, Chemicals) which is the right composition for this tape. Three positions (ABCAPITAL, DABUR, POLYCAB) sitting within 1% of SL — the SLs will fire if they fire, and Rule 17 mandates I do not preempt. Cancelling stale HFCL working order separately. No new BUYs on a -1.3% Nifty / +10.6% VIX day is an explicit choice, not anchoring."
}
